payload.subject: PSQ quality findings accepted -- implementation plan

acceptance.rationale: PSQ labeled experimental across all observatory UI. Findings confirm known risks of lite-model scoring and strengthen case for treating PSQ as ordinal.

R2_dimensionality_claim.note: Observatory display already collapses to 3 dims, not 11

R3_contractual_clarity.note: Not surfaced in any public UI -- no code change needed

payload.request_to_psychology_agent: When scorer comparison completes, send updated recommendations for factor-level restructuring.

claims.text: Observatory PSQ display already conservative -- shows composite + 3 dims, not 11

epistemic_flags: Observatory PSQ uses Workers AI lite models (not Haiku) -- scorer quality findings may not directly transfer
